firmCredits.title: Firm credits
firmCredits.subtitle: Track the credits available per firm and adjust them from super administration.

access.superAdminDescription: You can review every firm and top up credits immediately when operations require it.
access.localAdminDescription: You can review your firm balance. You can buy credits through Stripe, while manual top-ups remain restricted to the super administrator.

purchase.title: Buy credits
purchase.description: Choose a pack and pay online through Stripe. Credits are added automatically once the payment is confirmed.
purchase.disabledDescription: Configure Stripe server secrets to enable credit purchases for local admins.

empty.title: No firms to display
empty.description: No firm matches the current search, or no firm is available yet.

stats.visibleCreditsHelper: Sum of credits currently displayed on this page.
stats.consumedCreditsHelper: Sum of AI credits consumed by the firms currently displayed.

messages.invalidAmount: Amount must be a positive integer

detail.title: Credit detail for {{name}}
detail.subtitle: Track consumption and refunds by user and by action for this firm.

empty.title: Firm not found
empty.description: The requested credit detail is unavailable or you do not have access to this firm.

insufficient.title: Insufficient credits
insufficient.subtitleManager: Your firm does not have enough credits to start this AI action. Top up the balance and try again.
insufficient.subtitleUser: Your firm does not have enough credits to start this AI action. Contact an administrator to unblock it.
insufficient.heading: The firm's AI balance is too low
insufficient.actionMessage: The "{{action}}" action could not start because the firm does not have the required amount of credits.
insufficient.defaultMessage: This AI action could not start because the firm does not have the required amount of credits.
insufficient.nextStepsManager: Open firm credit management, top up the balance, then restart the AI action from the previous screen.
insufficient.nextStepsUser: Go back to the previous screen and contact your local administrator or super administrator so they can top up the firm's credits.
insufficient.contactManagerCta: Go back and contact an administrator
